text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle pesters me to go visit a farm with
her on my day off...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... It's not like the ones back home, but a
farm's a farm!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's so much energy here! The smell of the
pastures, the hummin' of the tractors...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The gentle breeze flowin' through the farm, the
bellowin' of stampeding cattle...

text_block_list.name: Farmer
text_block_list.text: It's an emergency! The cows have escaped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We turn to see several cows running through a
broken fence!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! They couldn't have escaped at a better
time! Y'all leave this to me, now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
S'all good! Wranglin' cows is what my family does!
I'm used to this kinda thing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She approaches the escaped cows from the side
while shouting commands, and they're back where
they belong in no time flat.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whew! And that's more or less how it's done! That
went surprisingly well for bein' on my lonesome!
choice_data_list: You'd never done it alone before?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Haha, nope! My mom and I always did it together
back home!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But never mind that! My body feels way lighter
from all that herding!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I get the feelin' I can take my speed up a notch
and make sharp turns right on the heel!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yessiree! I'm so glad we got out to this here farm!
Thanks for takin' me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I notice Taiki Shuttle's running has
certainly improved a lot, just like she predicted.
